title: Philippe Bibi
compiled_truth: Philippe Bibi is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2001-06-26), Philippe Bibi sent 13 and received 546 emails, totalling 559 interactions.
